opening.message:
Hi Maria. You have {account.dataRemaining} left and {account.daysUntilRenewal} days until your plan renews on {account.renewalDate}.

One thing I noticed: only {account.wifiUsagePercent}% of your usage goes through Wi-Fi — your phone is using cellular most of the time, even when you might not need to.

That's worth looking at before spending anything. Want me to walk you through a couple of quick fixes, or add data right now?

start.message:
I can see you're mostly on cellular — only {account.wifiUsagePercent}% of your usage goes through Wi-Fi. Let's see if there's a free fix first.

Want me to walk you through a couple of quick checks?

asked_wifi.message: Are you connected to Wi-Fi when you're at home or at work?

asked_streaming.message: Do you stream video or music on cellular — not just on Wi-Fi?

asked_background.message: Last one: do you have apps set to auto-update or sync in the background on cellular?

showing_fixes.message:
Here are three free fixes that could make a real difference:

✅ Turn off "Wi-Fi Assist" in Settings — stops your phone from silently switching to cellular when Wi-Fi slows down
✅ Set streaming apps to "Wi-Fi only" — YouTube and Netflix can each burn 1–3 GB per hour on HD over cellular
✅ Disable Background App Refresh — Settings → General → Background App Refresh and turn it off for apps that don't need to stay current in the background

Want to try these first? If they don't solve it, I can add data or change your plan in seconds.

start.message: Want to add 5 GB right now for $15? I'll charge your {account.savedCard}. Takes about 2 seconds.
Want to add 5 GB for $10? I'll charge your {account.savedCard}. Activates instantly.

Based on your usage, you've needed more than 5 GB almost every month. Here's what would stop this from happening again:

**Total 5G Unlimited** — $55/mo
✓ Unlimited data (no more running out)
✓ 10 GB hotspot
✓ Disney+ included
✓ Wi-Fi Calling

That's $15 more than your current plan.

You could start now — you'd only pay ~$7.14 today (prorated). Or switch at your next renewal on {account.renewalDate} with no charge today.

upgrade_now.message:
Switching you to Total 5G Unlimited now.

Total 5G Unlimited — $55/mo (was $40/mo)
Prorated today: ~$7.14 (14 days left)
Charged to: {account.savedCard}

Confirm?

upgrade_at_renewal.message:
Done — your upgrade to Total 5G Unlimited is scheduled for {account.renewalDate}. Nothing to pay today.

Want me to add 5 GB now to cover you until then?

keep_plan.message:
No problem. You're staying on Total Base 5G. If you need data before {account.renewalDate}, come back and I can add it in seconds.

Anything else I can help with?

show_options.message:
Here are your options:

• Add 5 GB for $15 — activates instantly, keeps your current plan
• Upgrade to Unlimited — $55/mo, no more caps, includes Disney+
• Wait until {account.renewalDate} — your plan renews soon

cancel.message: No problem. Is there anything else I can help you with?

try_free_fixes.message:
Great call. Here's a recap of the three fixes to try:

1. Settings → turn off "Wi-Fi Assist"
2. YouTube/Netflix → set to "Wi-Fi only"
3. Settings → General → Background App Refresh → off

If you run out before {account.renewalDate}, come back and I can add data instantly.

Anything else?

done.message:
You're all set. Come back any time!

Is there anything else before you go?
